messages.content: Key risks: (1) Location foot traffic mismatch, (2) Underestimating fixed costs, (3) Weak differentiation, (4) Seasonal demand swings, (5) Staffing churn. Mitigation: validate location, build cash buffer, test menu, track unit economics weekly.

message.content: Got it. I delegated the risk analysis and will use it to keep the plan grounded. Next, I’ll outline a minimal launch plan with weekly checkpoints.
